name: platform-feature-viewer
intent: Create a new demo page in apps/web that reads all platform feature schemas and displays them in a readable UI (not raw JSON). Features should be sortable and filterable. The goal is to make exploring feature sessions, requirements, findings, tasks, and other entities easy to browse and understand.

indicators: UI-focused feature displaying local MST data
Filtering and sorting are local state operations
uncertainties: Whether to use existing meta-store pattern or create dedicated viewer models
How to structure cross-entity navigation (session -> requirements -> tasks)
